name: profile: profiles/react.yaml resolves to a rule set containing every g-react-001..010 with severity P0 or P1
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/resolve.sh" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/react.yaml" --emit-resolved 2>out.json && for i in 001 002 003 004 005 006 007 008 009 010; do grep -E "g-react-$i" out.json >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL g-react-$i not in react profile" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
